creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #16: Wed Nov 25 15:51:32 CET 2009
worked well on the machine.

After update and rebuilding from src the kernel freezes hard.
Keyboard was activated but CTL_ALT_DEL and numlock does not work.

Booting with ACPI disabled is possible.

Last messages on console:
usbus0: 12Mbps Full Speed USB v1.0
usbus1: 12Mbps Full Speed USB v1.0

No additional messages there when booting verbose.

Diff of dmesg:

--- dmesg.noacpi	2010-01-22 16:53:43.000000000 +0100
+++ dmesg.acpi	2010-01-22 16:30:26.000000000 +0100

-uhub1: 2 ports with 2 removable, self powered

Diff of dmesg with last known good:

[...]

Fix: 

Workaround: boot with ACPI disabled
How-To-Repeat: 
	boot GENERIC on the hardware, Rennix 1HE Server.
